overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a military uniform exploring an indoor office environment. The character moves through rooms containing desks, maps, and bookshelves, then transitions through a corridor with partitions into a locker area where a guard is sleeping.

scene_state.functional_zone: military administrative office with desks and wall maps

events.description: character turns left to walk along the wall with framed map

agents.ego_description: walking through office examining the map and desk arrangements

entered.detail: tall wooden cabinet with glass doors containing books and files
large framed map mounted on green painted wall
dark chalkboard with white markings and text
long wooden tables with stacks of books and papers
red upholstered chairs positioned around desks
tall green potted plant in corner near wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a well-lit office space containing wooden bookshelves, desks with red chairs, and a large framed map on the wall. The environment features green wainscoting and tiled floors as the character moves past a blackboard and examines the room layout.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with bulletin boards and fabric partitions

events.description: character walks through doorway from main office to back corridor area

agents.ego_description: moving through doorway into corridor with pink cubicle partitions

entered.detail: cork board with papers and black-and-white photos pinned to wall
mauve fabric cubicle dividers on metal frames
brown wooden door frame leading to back room

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the main office through a doorway into a narrower corridor lined with bulletin boards on the right wall. Pink fabric partitions become visible ahead as the character moves deeper into the back area of the building.

scene_state.functional_zone: locker room with metal storage cabinets

events.description: lighting becomes noticeably dimmer as character enters locker area
character approaches sleeping guard indicated by floating Zzz symbols

agents.ego_description: carefully walking past sleeping guard in the dimly lit locker room

notable_agents.action: sleeping inside locker area with Zzz indicator floating above head

entered.detail: row of beige metal storage lockers with ventilation grates
poster on wall depicting a woman above filing cabinet
brown wooden filing cabinet with multiple drawers

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the partition area into a darker locker room with metal storage cabinets lining the right wall. A guard is seen sleeping near the lockers, indicated by floating Zzz symbols, as the character sneaks past toward a wooden door at the far end of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, organized office space into a dim, secluded locker room. It begins by gliding through a well-lit room featuring wooden bookshelves, red chairs, and a large framed map against green wainscoting. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts through a doorway into a narrower corridor lined with bulletin boards before approaching a series of pink fabric partitions. The camera then pushes through these partitions into a darker environment where metal storage cabinets line the walls. Finally, the movement slows as the character sneaks past a sleeping guard marked by floating Zzz symbols, heading toward a wooden door at the far end of the room.
